subject: Action needed: falcon planning in East Asia | Albert Einstein | Q1 review | INIT-6749
body: Here is a progress summary for the falcon plan in East Asia. Current status is review with monthly updates owned by delivery. Review dependencies across operations and flag unresolved risks. Confirm owners for each work package and share ETA by end of day. Albert Einstein is cited as a case study for risk management in this domain. Reference initiative INIT-6749. Escalate blockers directly if they affect delivery this week. Tracking tags: drop-bears, delivery.
